name: hydro-imbalance
description: Tereon module for basin-scale water-cycle imbalance data, classification, time series, and literature evidence.

scripts.check: node --check public/modules/water-imbalance/index.js && node --check scripts/build/build-water-imbalance-module.js && node --check scripts/build/build-water-runtime-graph.js && node --check scripts/ingest/ingest-literature.js && node --check scripts/ingest/harvest-openalex-literature.js && node --check catalog/literature/reference-catalog.js && node --check catalog/regions/basin-profiles.js
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run validate
